creator: nikolai.lifanov@plaidskirtmarketing.com
text:
This was quick: here is the good shar

_________________


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#    linux-f10-flashplugin10
#    linux-f10-flashplugin10/Makefile
#    linux-f10-flashplugin10/distinfo
#    linux-f10-flashplugin10/pkg-descr
#    linux-f10-flashplugin10/pkg-plist
#
echo c - linux-f10-flashplugin10
mkdir -p linux-f10-flashplugin10 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - linux-f10-flashplugin10/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >linux-f10-flashplugin10/Makefile << 
'be4f86d6e15b4925d326587110431e22'
X# New ports collection makefile for:    www/linux-f10-flashplugin10
X# Date created:                2009-06-26
X# Whom:                    bsam
X# Based on:                www/linux-f8-flashplugin10 by nox@
X#
X# $FreeBSD: ports/www/linux-f10-flashplugin10/Makefile,v 1.11 
2010/11/06 17:55:51 nox Exp $
X#
X
XPORTNAME=    flashplugin
XPORTVERSION=    10.1r102
XCATEGORIES=    www multimedia linux
XMASTER_SITES=    
http://fpdownload.macromedia.com/get/flashplayer/current/:plugin \
X        ftp://ftp.ipt.ru/pub/download/:suplib
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=    linux-f10-
XDISTFILES=    install_flash_player_10_linux.tar.gz:plugin \
X        linux-f10-flashsupport-9.0.1.i386.tar.gz:suplib
XDIST_SUBDIR=    ${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}
X
XMAINTAINER=    emulation@FreeBSD.org
XCOMMENT=    Adobe Flash Player NPAPI Plugin
X
XONLY_FOR_ARCHS=    amd64 i386
XUSE_LINUX=    yes
XUSE_LINUX_APPS=    openssl curl cyrus-sasl2 libssh2 nspr nss openldap gtk2
X
XRESTRICTED=    Redistribution not allowed
XRESTRICTED_FILES=    ${DISTFILES:Nlinux-f10-flashsupport*:C/:[^:]+$//}
X
XNO_BUILD=    yes
XWRKSRC=        ${WRKDIR}
X
XUSE_NPAPI=    linux-*
XNPAPI_FILES=    libflashplayer.so
X
XCONFLICTS=    linux-flashplugin-7* linux-flashplugin-9* 
linux-f8-flashplugin10-*
X
Xpost-install:
X    @${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKDIR}/libflashsupport.so ${LINUXBASE}/usr/lib
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X.include "${PORTSDIR}/www/linux-mplayer-plugin/Makefile.npapi"
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
be4f86d6e15b4925d326587110431e22
echo x - linux-f10-flashplugin10/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >linux-f10-flashplugin10/distinfo << 
'505f0b2a1a1655e42c25b37ad0f7721d'
XSHA256 (flashplugin/10.1r102/linux-f10-flashsupport-9.0.1.i386.tar.gz) 
= 4a309b1a326bd2212cc72480628659e5a7fd61d9e0572cb7350c206f030955bf
XSIZE (flashplugin/10.1r102/linux-f10-flashsupport-9.0.1.i386.tar.gz) = 3455
XSHA256 (flashplugin/10.1r102/install_flash_player_10_linux.tar.gz) = 
c26800f60ff01ba82fd7edac45fd3c71fb5c9977cf3ccd0c3615b438d44ed3c9
XMD5 (flashplugin/10.1r102/install_flash_player_10_linux.tar.gz) = 
f628237fc297db061a582c42b639871a
XSIZE (flashplugin/10.1r102/install_flash_player_10_linux.tar.gz) = 4911328
505f0b2a1a1655e42c25b37ad0f7721d
echo x - linux-f10-flashplugin10/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >linux-f10-flashplugin10/pkg-descr << 
'05f1d9f5eb414b6501ea17ec9c139a8a'
XThis is the official Flash Player from Adobe. This plugin enables
Xyou to see .swf and .spl files on the 'net from your Opera, Mozilla or
XFirefox sessions.
X
XPlease see the Adobe home page for more information.
X
XFreeBSD Flash License Agreement:
X    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/96374
X
XWWW: http://www.adobe.com/
05f1d9f5eb414b6501ea17ec9c139a8a
echo x - linux-f10-flashplugin10/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >linux-f10-flashplugin10/pkg-plist << 
'8b63335914aa1035ea9b3abe9827b2cf'
X@cwd /compat/linux
Xusr/lib/libflashsupport.so
X@cwd
8b63335914aa1035ea9b3abe9827b2cf
exit
